value.title: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Solid Fundamentals
value.summary: Companies that consistently increase their sales, margins, or returns on capital are usually rewarded with the best returns, and those that can do all three for years on end are almost always the legendary stocks that return 100 times your money.

value.title: Broadcom, OpenAI deal hit as infrastructure costs take center stage
value.summary: The artificial intelligence race is no longer only about building the biggest models or buying the most powerful chips. It is also becoming a cost-control problem. That is the message behind OpenAI’s Jalapeño, the custom chip it designed with Broadcom (AVGO). The chip gives Broadcom another role in ...

value.title: What Qualcomm Stock Was Saying About Its Multibillion-Dollar Data Center Plan
value.summary: Before the stock surged, management was methodically laying out a future beyond handsets, but you had to be listening for a different kind of story.
